description: Product description Rexona 48 hours protection against underarm dampness with MotionSense technology. Gives you long-lasting protection even in stressful situations. A fresher citrus fragrance than ordinary 150 ml deodorant sprays. Directions Shake well before use. Hold the dispenser upright and spray from a distance of about 15 cm under the armpits. Avoid contact with eyes and mouth.
